overall.description: Third-person gameplay from a survival horror game depicting a character exploring a foggy, overgrown Victorian-style park. The character walks through paved courtyards with planters and benches, passes under vine-covered pergolas, and examines a prominent equestrian statue and an ornate stone memorial wall in the thick mist.

scene_state.functional_zone: foggy courtyard with raised planter beds and benches

events.description: character enters covered pergola area with dense vines overhead

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the foggy courtyard toward a vine-covered walkway

entered.detail: raised rectangular planter bed with dry soil and weeds
wooden pergola structure heavily overgrown with vines

segments.scene_description: The character begins in a foggy courtyard featuring a central raised stone planter and wooden benches. Walking forward, the character approaches and enters a vine-covered pergola that creates a semi-enclosed walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway with dense overhead vines

events.description: exiting the covered pergola into open area with equestrian statue visible through fog
equestrian statue on stone pedestal emerges from the fog ahead

agents.ego_description: walking through the vine-covered tunnel toward a clearing with a large statue

entered.detail: large bronze statue of a figure on horseback atop a stone pedestal
tall brick and stone wall covered in ivy

segments.scene_description: The character moves through the sheltered pergola with dense vines overhead. Exiting the covered area, a large equestrian statue becomes visible through the thick fog ahead, while the courtyard elements fall behind.

events.description: character circles around the equestrian statue, examining it from different angles
leaving the statue plaza and entering a tree-lined cobblestone path

agents.ego_description: circling the equestrian statue to examine it, then proceeding down a cobblestone path

entered.detail: winding path paved with wet cobblestones
large carved stone wall with decorative arch and columns

segments.scene_description: The character approaches and circles the imposing equestrian statue on its stone pedestal, examining it from various angles before continuing down a cobblestone path. An ornate stone memorial wall becomes visible in the distance through the fog.

scene_state.functional_zone: memorial garden with ornate stone wall

events.description: character stops to examine the ornate carvings on the stone memorial wall
character turns around and begins walking back toward the pergola area

agents.ego_description: approaching the ornate stone memorial, examining its carved details closely, then turning to head back

entered.detail: stone wall completely covered in dense ivy
wooden pergola visible in the distance as the character turns back

segments.scene_description: The character reaches the ornate stone memorial wall, examining its intricate carvings and columns up close. After a moment of observation, the character turns and begins walking back toward the vine-covered pergola visible through the fog.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a foggy Victorian park that transitions from a sheltered courtyard to an open plaza of monuments. It begins in a misty courtyard with a central stone planter and wooden benches, moving forward to enter a semi-enclosed walkway beneath a vine-covered pergola. As the character exits the sheltered greenery, the scene opens up to reveal a large equestrian statue emerging from the thick fog. The camera then circles the imposing statue on its pedestal before following a cobblestone path toward an ornate stone memorial wall with intricate carvings. Finally, after examining the columns of the wall up close, the character turns and begins to retreat back toward the distant silhouette of the pergola.
